title: K@bar #3529
definition:
Chebar = "far-off"

 1) a Babylonian river near which many Israelite exiles settled; maybe
    the 'Habor' or the 'Royal Canal' of Nebuchadnezzar
nasbUsage:
Definition: Chebar = "far-off"

 1) a Babylonian river near which many Israelite exiles settled; maybe
    the 'Habor' or the 'Royal Canal' of Nebuchadnezzar

    NASB:  a river of Bab.
